text: We begin our procedure with division of the inferior pulmonary ligament.
A tissue sealer was used to open the mediastinal pleura exposing the diverticulum.
The diverticulum was easily located and shown here at the mid esophagus.
And a 56 French bougie was then inserted and the diverticulum was transected using a linear stapler.
The specimen was then removed in a retrieval device.
Intraoperative endoscopy was performed with air and sufflation.
And a water submersion test revealed no evidence of LEET.
The staple line was then inspected.
And a 24 French chest tube was then inserted.
